log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Warforged — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Warforged — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 40 damage. Warforged — Unarmored Caster HP: 27/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Warforged — Unarmored Caster HP: 13/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
--- Warforged — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 13/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Warforged — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
